Hades II for Xbox Series X and PlayStation 5 run at an ultrafast 120 frames per second, and these latest versions also include some bonus content and quality-of-life improvements we've been working on in the meantime!
Hades II for Xbox and PlayStation has been our focus since last year's v1.0 launch, during which time the game earned numerous industry accolades, including Best Action Game at The Game Awards and the D.I.C.E.
The Steam Winter Sale is on now, so you can get Hades II for 25% off there, as well as the Nintendo eShop and Epic Games Store!

Early access ends this month!","content":"* Hades 2 v1.0 release date announced. It's also coming to Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2. Supergiant Games has announced that Hades 2, the sequel to their mythic roguelike, will be leaving early access and launching in full with version 1.0 coming this month. The game has spent over a year in early access on PC. That’s not the only good news: Hades 2 is also coming to both the Nintendo Switch and the Nintendo Switch 2. If you own both consoles, the upgrade to the Switch 2 version will be free. ## What is the Hades 2 v1.0 release date? Without further ado, the big reveal: Hades 2 v1.0 release date is slated for September 25, just two weeks from now! The Nintendo Switch version will release digitally on the same day, with a physical edition (on a 'standard physical game card') set to follow on November 20. It's now available on Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, Steam, and the","score":0.6501347,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.supergiantgames.com/blog/hades2-coming-sep25","title":"Hades II v1.0 Coming September 25, 2025! | Supergiant Games","content":"# Hades II v1.0 Coming September 25, 2025! We're very excited to announce that ***Hades II*** v1.0 is coming very soon, on **September 25, 2025**! If you already have ***Hades II*** in Early Access on Steam or the Epic Games Store, v1.0 will be a free automatic update. New players will be able to purchase the game digitally at the current price, for these platforms along with Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch, where ***Hades II*** is now available for pre-order. Among the additions coming in v1.0, ***Hades II*** offers cross-saves between the Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 versions, and the Steam and the Epic Games Store versions. If you've been playing in Early Access and wish to continue the journey on Nintendo's game consoles, you'll be able to transfer your save data through a simple in-game menu.
